item.description: Two sources familiar with the matter say former Trump National Security Advisor John Bolton, a fierce Trump critic, will now plead guilty to one count of unlawfully retaining national security information. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

media:content.media:title: John Bolton to plead guilty in classified documents case
media:content.media:description: Two sources familiar with the matter say former Trump National Security Advisor John Bolton, a fierce Trump critic, will now plead guilty to one count of unlawfully retaining national security information. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

item.title: John Bolton to plead guilty in classified documents case

item.dc:creator: Kyle Stewart
Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The vote comes after the House passed a resolution earlier this week against President Donald Trump’s war against Iran.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-UKRAINE-RUSSIA-CONFLICT-WAR
media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to extinguish a fire following Russian strikes in Kyiv last month.

item.title: House passes Ukraine aid bill in another GOP rebuke of Trump’s foreign policy

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Bridget Bowman
Sahil Kapur
item.description: For the Democratic Party, the road to Maine’s Senate primary is paved in dread.

media:content.media:text: Graham Platner speaks
media:content.media:description: Graham Platner, a Maine Democrat and U.S. Senate candidate, during an interview in York, Maine, on April 17, 2026.

item.title: Democrats navigate a new Graham Platner controversy in Maine’s battleground Senate race

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: Christopher Nolan’s film, which rolls out in theaters July 17, is already causing a frenzy among moviegoers.

media:content.media:text: Matt Damon is Odysseus in "The Odyssey."
media:content.media:description: Matt Damon as Odysseus in "The Odyssey."

media:content.media:text: Matt Damon and Zendaya in "The Odyssey."
media:content.media:description: Matt Damon as Odysseus in "The Odyssey."

item.title: ‘The Odyssey’ ticket rush overwhelms AMC website and app

item.dc:creator: Janis Mackey Frayer
Nat Sumon
item.description: Through the long days and nights he and four other men were trapped inside a flooded cave, all Mued Duangsomdy could think about was food.

media:content.media:text: Rescuers pull four from flooded cave in Laos
media:content.media:description: Rescued men are welcomed, after seven Lao nationals who had entered a cave to prospect for gold were trapped for more than a week when rising water blocked their exit, in Xaisomboun province, Laos, May 30, 2026, in this screen grab taken from social media video.

media:content.media:text: A man is rescued from a cave in Laos on May 29, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Mued Duangsomdy was rescued from the cave Friday.

item.title: Laos cave survivor recounts days trapped in dark, flooded cave

item.dc:creator: Samantha Elkins
item.description: Cloudflare says 57.4% of requests to a selection of websites it hosts are now automated bot requests, while 42.6% are human-generated.

media:content.media:text: empty corporate cubicles
media:content.media:description: Humans might browse five websites before making a purchase, while an AI service might browse 5,000.

item.title: Bot web traffic has overtaken human web traffic, data shows

item.dc:creator: Jesse Kirsch
item.description: Despite disappointment over seat locations, many supporters remain grateful for access to relatively affordable tickets.

media:content.media:text: A banner for the American Outlaws
media:content.media:description: An American Outlaws banner at a U.S. game against Portugal at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta March 31.

media:content.media:text: United States v Belgium - International Friendly
media:content.media:description: An American Outlaws banner at a U.S. game against Portugal at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta March 31.

item.title: Team USA’s loudest supporters say FIFA pushed them to upper deck for World Cup

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
Emmy Beck-Aden
item.description: Handy played the bartender Jimmy in “Top Gun: Maverick,” Milton Briggs in “Arachnophobia” and other characters.

media:content.media:text: James Handy
media:content.media:description: James Handy in an episode of "NYPD Blue" in 1995.

item.title: Actor James Handy stabbed to death in Los Angeles

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: The men’s and women’s races will determine who will represent Team USA at the Los Angeles Olympics in 2028.

media:content.media:text: Conner Mantz crosses the finish line to place first during the 2024 U.S. Olympic Team Trials
media:content.media:description: Conner Mantz crosses the finish line to place first during the U.S. Olympic marathon trials in Orlando, Fla., on Feb. 3, 2024.

item.title: St. Louis to host 2028 U.S. Olympic marathon trials

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The controversial pick drew bipartisan pushback when Trump announced he would nominate him to the position permanently.

media:content.media:text: William Pulte speaks outside
media:content.media:description: A handful of Senate Republicans said they wouldn't back Bill Pulte's confirmation to a permanent position as DNI.

item.title: Trump says Bill Pulte will serve only in an acting capacity as DNI

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
Kyle Stewart
Gabrielle Khoriaty
Isabelle Schmeler
item.description: The committee asked for the probe after Sarah Kellen, Epstein’s former assistant, testified that she’d been preyed upon by three men, one of whom is dead.

media:content.media:text: Jeffrey Epstein's Former Assistant Sarah Kellen Interviewed By House Oversight Committee
media:content.media:description: Jeffrey Epstein's former assistant Sarah Kellen arrives to testify at a closed-door interview with the House Oversight Committee on Capitol Hill on May 21, 2026 in Washington, DC.

item.title: House committee calls on DOJ to investigate two men with ties to Jeffrey Epstein

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen explores how congressional Republicans are starting to push back on some of President Donald Trump’s wishes.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Makes An Announcement On Coal From The White House's Oval Office
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump speaks during a "Beautiful, Clean Coal" event in the Oval Office of the White House on June 4, 2026.

item.title: Cracks emerge in GOP support for Trump’s agenda: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Courtney Kube
Julia Ainsley
Dan De Luce
item.description: CIA officer David Rush is scheduled to appear in court Friday after the FBI said it found $40 million in gold bars stashed at his Virginia home.

media:content.media:text: Gold bars.
media:content.media:description: Court papers say David Rush had requested and received from the CIA a large amount of foreign currency and gold bars (not pictured) for “work-related expenses.”

item.title: CIA puts senior officials on leave over officer arrested with gold bars

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Attorneys for the iconic performing arts venue said the signage must revert to previous names like The John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts by June 12.

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX Trump Kennedy Center
media:content.media:description: The John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts in Washington on May 29.

item.title: Kennedy Center lawyers tell staff to remove references to Trump in signage

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Tim Rohan
item.description: Brunson hit two shots in the final minutes to seal Game 1 of the NBA Finals. Plus, Mexico’s teenage sensation Gilberto Mora is today’s World Cup spotlight.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game One
media:content.media:description: Jalen Brunson of the New York Knicks shoots during Game 1 of the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: New York Knicks Fans Gather In Manhattan To Watch Game 1 Of The NBA Finals Against San Antonio Spurs
media:content.media:description: Jalen Brunson of the New York Knicks shoots during Game 1 of the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: Mexico's midfielder Gilberto Mora vies for the ball with Australia's defender Aziz Behich during a friendly match in Pasadena, Calif., on May 30, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Jalen Brunson of the New York Knicks shoots during Game 1 of the NBA Finals.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Jalen Brunson, ‘Captain Clutch,’ ices Game 1 for Knicks

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Frank Thorp V
item.description: Some Republicans want to amend the bill to prohibit the Trump administration from setting up the “anti-weaponization” fund that could pay Jan. 6 rioters.

media:content.media:text: The Capitol Building
media:content.media:description: Both parties are forcing the other to cast tough votes during a lengthy "vote-a-rama."

item.title: Some Republicans cast votes against Trump priorities as Senate takes up ICE and Border Patrol bill

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We’re tracking the best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals live, including discounts on tech, home, beauty, kitchen products and more before the four-day sale begins.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

item.title: The 51+ best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals you can shop now: Bissell, Le Creuset, Levi’s, and more (live updates)

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: Le Creuset Dutch ovens, stainless steel pans, nonstick ceramic skillets and more are up to 40% off at the brand’s Summer Cookware Event.

media:content.media:text: Le Creuset’s cookware is known for its sturdiness and excellent heat retention.
media:content.media:description: Le Creuset’s cookware is known for its sturdiness and excellent heat retention.

item.title: Le Creuset Summer Sale: Save $170 on Dutch ovens and up to 40% on nonstick pans and more
